batch.title: Batch performance
batch.description: Among accounts delivered more than 30 days ago, how many remain without critical status and outside the vault (proxy for useful asset life).
batch.waitingWindow: waiting for the 30-day window for analysis

cards.requestDesc: Repeat your last order or enter the desired quantity.
cards.searchDesc: Find accounts by type, platform, year, and minimum spend.
cards.accountsDesc: Spend per account, ROI, utilization rate, and Google Ads API sync.
cards.disputesDesc: Dispute banned accounts, request replacement, or commercial operations.
cards.profileDesc: Update email, password, WhatsApp, and notifications.
cards.supportDesc: FAQ, contact form, and email support.
cards.landingDesc: Briefs, ready pages, and campaign structure for your niche — full solution beyond the account.

profitBoard.title: Profit Board
profitBoard.subtitle: Module 06 — consolidates spend (Creative Vault), real revenue (S2S postbacks) and LTV per buyer.
profitBoard.sourceCreativeVault: Source: daily metrics in Creative Vault
profitBoard.afterDeduction: After {pct}% deduction on tracker gross revenue
profitBoard.bleedingBody: Last 7 days: {spend} BRL spend in Creative Vault and {checkouts} checkout redirects (initiate checkout). Review VSL / offer and consider pausing traffic.
profitBoard.noOffers: No offers linked in Shield & Tracker yet — link one for S2S revenue to show here.
profitBoard.benchmarkAbove: Your Creative Vault ROI is {delta} percentage points above the anonymous average in niche {niche} (sample: {n} mentees).
profitBoard.benchmarkBelow: Your Creative Vault ROI is {delta} percentage points below the anonymous average in niche {niche} (sample: {n} mentees).
profitBoard.uniCap: Suggested cap today (UNI / shield health): up to +{pct}% on daily budget.
profitBoard.dreHint: Monthly day-by-day: gross revenue, deduction %, net revenue, Creative Vault spend, profit.
profitBoard.ltvHint: Purchases grouped by buyer identity from postbacks. Upsells count toward the same buyer.
profitBoard.ltvEmpty: No LTV aggregates yet for your offers.
profitBoard.campaignsHint: Prioritize scaling creatives tied to these tracked URLs on your UNIs.
profitBoard.telegramNote: Bleeding: in-app alert + ops Telegram if configured.

liveProofLabs.title: Live Proof Labs
liveProofLabs.subtitle: Full transparency: real desk offers — test pipeline, lighthouse (validated / scaling), syncable metrics, and the graveyard. Replicate unlocks the Vault template and preps Shield.
liveProofLabs.emTesteIntro: What the team is validating before recommending scale.
liveProofLabs.lighthouseIntro: What we already proved on our dime; replicate in one click.
liveProofLabs.graveyardIntro: Offers we tested that did not work — so you do not pay for the same mistake.
liveProofLabs.skinInGameHint: Real desk spend on this offer, per day (last 7 days).
liveProofLabs.replicateHint: Unlocks this case template in Creative Vault, sends VSL notes to the agency, and pre-configures Shield with your checkout.
liveProofLabs.openShield: Opening Shield in a new tab.
liveProofLabs.strategistNoteEmpty: No strategist note yet — open the full dossier for history.

operatorManual.title: Operator manual
operatorManual.subtitle: Quick reference: main War Room OS routes and the official PDF (if configured).
operatorManual.pdfHint: Opens in a new tab. Save offline if you want.

welcomeOnboarding.slide1Body: This is your operations terminal. The video summarizes what to expect — unmute when you are ready.
welcomeOnboarding.videoFallback: Your browser cannot play embedded video.
welcomeOnboarding.videoPlaceholder: Welcome video not configured yet. Ask your manager for the link or continue.
welcomeOnboarding.videoHint: Starts muted with autoplay when the browser allows. Use controls to enable sound.
welcomeOnboarding.slide2Body: Follow this order to protect budget: identity, asset, proven offer, shielding, then scale.
welcomeOnboarding.slide3Body: The Ads Ativos front line works with you inside the same software.
welcomeOnboarding.teamFooter: Our front line is ready for you. Use SOS Contingency in the sidebar or War Room Live when needed.
welcomeOnboarding.completeError: Could not save progress. Try again or contact support.

warRoomOs.loadError: Could not load checklist. Refresh the page.
warRoomOs.checklistSubtitle: Five milestones to first sale with shielding and a desk-validated offer.
warRoomOs.lexiconHint: Business language: domain shielding (not just DNS), intelligence history (not raw API logs).

gamification.title: Achievement Arsenal
gamification.subtitle: Your rank rises with real net profit (tracker S2S minus Creative Vault). Redeem physical rewards and see the anonymous weekly ROI leaderboard.
gamification.maxPatent: Top rank in the system — keep scaling.
gamification.arsenalIntro: Physical rewards. Locked items appear grayscale with a lock icon.
gamification.redeemOk: Request saved. Commercial / Francielle was emailed.
gamification.redeemNoEmail: Request saved. Logistics inbox not configured — contact support.
gamification.redeemEmailFail: Request saved but email failed. Contact support with the reward code.
gamification.redeemWebhookFail: Webhook configured but failed — ops may not have received the ping.
gamification.leaderboardTeaserHint: Anonymous callsigns — ROI % and niche only.
gamification.leaderboardEmpty: No public data this week — link offers in Shield and log spend in Creative Vault.
gamification.linkProfitBoard: Open Profit Board for periods and deductions
gamification.rankUpSub: Keep executing — the next milestone is closer.
gamification.shippingModalHint: We send this to logistics to ship your physical prize.

rewards.moletomDesc: Operator hoodie — authority piece for social.

errors.GENERIC: Something went wrong. Please try again.
